machine_note: Maker Nexus/home shop; verify exact machine, spindle, collet, bed size, and hold-down before CAM.
assumptions: This is a pre-CAM operation graph, not verified G-code.
The active build range is C3-C6, 37 bars.
Source dimensions come from family-spec.csv and marimba-design-table.xlsx.
The CNC plan assumes African Padauk blanks surfaced to 0.875 in.
Resonator tube bore is still a sourcing variable; update tube lengths after selecting actual ID.

release_criteria: C3 center thickness remains at least 0.250 in.
A4 tunes within normal sanding allowance.
C6 shallow arch does not become overly stiff or dead.
The measured K trend is consistent enough to continue.

operations.name: Review design package and pilot gate
operations.datum: Top face A, left end B, bar centerline C
checks: Actual wood species and tube bore confirmed
Full-set cutting is held until pilot data is reviewed
operations.notes: Do not cut full set until pilot bars validate K constant and arch schedule.

operations.name: Surface and thickness bar blanks
operations.tool: Jointer knives, planer, drum sander, calipers
operations.datum: Top face A and grain arrow
operations.notes: Leave length and width allowance for tabs and final tuning cleanup.

operations.name: Label blanks and mark nodes
operations.tool: Marking knife, square, center punch, calipers
operations.datum: Left end B and centerline C
outputs: Labeled blanks with note, target Hz, nodes
checks: Top face remains marked through the flip operation
operations.notes: Cord/support holes belong at free-free nodes.

operations.name: Prepare CNC fixture and datum verification
operations.tool: Spoilboard surfacing bit, edge finder/probe, clamps/tape
operations.workholding: Replaceable spoilboard, datum fence, optional vacuum plus clamps
operations.datum: Machine X0 at left end B, Y0 at centerline C, Z0 top face A
operations.notes: This operation creates confidence before Padauk is loaded.

operations.name: Rough profile bars with tabs
operations.tool: 1/4 in downcut spiral; optional 1/8 in upcut for small reliefs
operations.workholding: Spoilboard tape/clamps, tabs at non-vibrating ends
operations.datum: Top face A, left end B, centerline C
checks: Tabs do not overlap node holes or arch region
operations.notes: Use conservative depth per pass and preserve labeled orientation.

operations.name: 3D arch underside relief
operations.tool: 3/4 in ball-end mill; 1/2 in ball-end for treble alternative
operations.workholding: Cradle or flip fixture supporting top face without denting
operations.datum: Top face A re-referenced after flip; left end B retained
outputs: Underside arch cut on each bar
operations.notes: Use parabolic toolpath over about 60 percent of bar length. This is the pitch-lowering operation.

operations.name: Drill support holes at nodes
operations.tool: 1/4 in brad-point bit or boring tool
operations.notes: Pilot on scrap before drilling tuned bars.

operations.name: Hand tune bars
operations.tool: Soft node supports, tuner, sanding block, scraper, scale
operations.workholding: Padded bench, supports at node_1 and node_2
checks: Measured Hz recorded at flat/post-arch/post-sand/final stages
operations.notes: Remove underside center material to lower pitch. Sneak up slowly.

operations.name: Cut and deburr resonator tubes
operations.machine: Chop saw / band saw / tube cutter
outputs: Oversize resonator tubes labeled by note
operations.notes: Recalculate lengths if selected bore differs from current proxy.

operations.name: Cap and mount resonators
operations.datum: Tube open end and bar centerline
operations.notes: Use removable caps for first validation build.

operations.name: Build frame and support rails
operations.tool: Saw blade, drill bits, router bits
operations.notes: Temporary validation frame is acceptable before final furniture-grade frame.

operations.name: Final validation and release
operations.datum: Same support and strike datum used for every note
operations.notes: Do not treat dimensions as final until measured data closes the loop.

release_checks: Every operation has a datum and workholding method.
Every tool has a real machine available or an escalation note.
All tuning-critical features include trim allowance.
C3/A4/C6 pilot data is reviewed before cutting all 37 bars.
Actual resonator bore is selected before final tube lengths are frozen.
validation.csv receives measured data after the first prototype.
